structurePatterns: Modal shadow only (0 12px 36px, subtle) — no resting shadows elsewhere
Button order: cancel on LEFT, confirm on RIGHT
Return key binds to confirm (primary) button
Destructive button never gets blue default or Return binding
Header uses title style, body uses body style
usageHints: alert = critical info/warning (never use popover for warnings)
One modal at a time — never stack two alerts
Cancel always on left, confirm/destructive on right
doNotInvent: Side-sheet or bottom-sheet without explicit need
Blue confirm button in destructive dialogs
Animated/bouncy modal transitions — Aham motion is restrained
